## Docs / roadmap delta

## Checklist

- [ ] The spec change is backward-compatible, or the breaking-change rationale is documented in the PR body
- [ ] New spec text follows the existing style (tables, code blocks with explicit type labels)
- [ ] If this adds or changes a field, endpoint, protocol semantic, or security control, the relevant spec/docs/threat-model entry is updated
- [ ] If this resolves an open question, the issue or docs entry that tracked the question is updated
- [ ] I ran the relevant local gates (`make check` or the focused `make check-*` targets) for the touched surfaces
- [ ] Any skipped or quarantined test has a linked issue, a named owner, and a review date

## For design-partner contributions

- [ ] I am named as a co-author in the spec header for this section
